## What happened
The Irish Mirror reported that veterinarians and animal advocates are urging dog and cat owners to be wary of toxic Easter foods.

## Key facts
Chocolate, raisins, hot cross buns and xylitol-sweetened sweets are poisonous to dogs and cats. Even small amounts can cause vomiting, seizures, kidney failure or worse.

## What pet owners should do
Keep Easter treats out of reach, do not share human food, and contact a vet immediately if your pet shows signs of poisoning.
